name: Squid.. squirt game / You broke your sugar honeycomb
description:
Are you happy that you choose a sugar honeycomb with the shape of a triangle? Well, I'm sorry, you broke it. And what follows is your punishment.

A request from tiktok. The picture is not mine.

WELCOME CRITICISM. TELL ME THE MISTAKES I DIDN'T FIND.

Update: Hhehe freaks in honor of the third season are back, it's cool. Hello(◕‿↼)
creator: Mortie2
